title: The 10 Pittsburgh Sweets on Social
subtitle: Bakeries, pastry shops, ice cream, dessert.
angle: the Pittsburgh dessert shops showing up online this spring, ranked by creator pickup. Who creators are filming and what those videos reveal.
intro:
Page's, the seventy-five-year-old ice cream stand in Arlington, drew enough reviews this quarter to rank first in Pittsburgh sweets across 3,145 shops. The TikTok creators filming it have nowhere to tag back to. There's no Page's TikTok account. Just a line on Brownsville Road and a stack of footage with no destination.

That gap is what this list is about. La Gourmandine Hazelwood sits first among Pittsburgh pastry shops and 36th in sweets overall. Its Instagram has been dark for 53 days. Jeni's in Larimer brings 450 photos and the strongest visual foundation on this list. No TikTok presence to turn the attention into a following. Kyo Matcha is here on cakes and matcha. Millie's is here on the flagship that started at the farmers' market.

Summer will test whether any of these shops close the distance on purpose. Warm weather brings more foot traffic, more phones, more impulse filming. Issue 02 will track who turned the moment into something durable.

items.name: La Gourmandine Hazelwood
items.descriptor: First in pastry shops, 36th in sweets. Instagram has been dark for 53 days.

featured_tiktok.author: melissasadhdlife

I love La Gourmandine, they never disappoint 🥐 🍫

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sweets on 3,153 reviews. The TikTok audience has no account to follow.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sweets on a full profile and 450 photos. TikTok is the one platform missing.

featured_tiktok.author: soysauceyybae

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Top cafe slot on cakes and matcha. Creator volume is still thin.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx

items.name: Millie's Homemade Ice Cream
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sweets on review depth. The TikTok layer is one creator deep.

items.name: 350° Bakery
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh bakeries. No hours, no phone, no Instagram.

items.name: Allegro - Vegan Bakery & Sandwich Shop
items.descriptor: First in bakeries, 116th in sweets. No Instagram, no hours, no phone.

items.name: Amy's Bakery
items.descriptor: First in bakeries, 120th in sweets. The product story has nowhere to land.

items.name: Angelina's Bakery & Pastry Shop
items.descriptor: First in bakeries, near last in sweets. Zero photos and no hours.

items.name: Antney's Ice Cream
items.descriptor: First in ice cream, 112th in sweets. The gap is everything Google can't find.
